items.title: Cholera outbreak declared in coastal provinces, hospitals on alert
items.description: Health authorities have declared an outbreak after a sharp rise in confirmed cases. Emergency response teams have been deployed to the worst-affected districts.

items.title: Magnitude 5.2 earthquake felt across the region, buildings evacuated
items.description: A moderate earthquake struck early this morning. There are reports of structural damage to older buildings; assessment teams are surveying affected areas.

items.title: Seasonal rains bring localized flooding to farmland
items.description: Heavier-than-usual seasonal rains have flooded low-lying farmland in several districts, with some rural roads temporarily cut off.

items.title: Regional summit on trade cooperation concludes with new accord
items.description: Heads of state signed a cooperation accord aimed at easing cross-border trade and investment.
